raw_text: A coworker showed me a knife in the break room and said he'd use it if I reported him.
My supervisor threatened me and I am afraid for my safety at work now.
I've been thinking about hurting myself because of how bad things have gotten at work.
He got right up in my face yelling and I genuinely thought he might hit me.
He's been leaving notes implying he knows where I live and when I leave work each day.
He mentioned he has a firearm at home and joked about bringing it to work someday.
I've stopped eating properly and can't sleep at all because of what keeps happening at work.
This deadline is killing me this week, I don't think I can hit it honestly.
My new hire got so fired up about the project that she stayed late every night this week.
I feel personally assaulted by how much sarcasm was in that email, honestly.
The gun show at the convention center made parking impossible again this weekend.
My manager told me if I file this complaint I'll be fired for reporting it.
I'm afraid I'll lose my job if I say anything about this to anyone.
Everyone knows what happens to people who go to HR around here, so I'm nervous about this.
My manager keeps making comments about my appearance during one-on-ones.
I was passed over for the promotion and I think my age was part of the reason.
The scaffolding on the third floor has been unstable for two weeks and nobody has fixed it.
I think the way my termination was handled may have violated my contract terms.
I have not been paid for the last two pay cycles and I am in serious financial trouble.
My benefits enrollment was processed incorrectly and it's affecting my dependents' coverage.
I have a question about how my dental benefit claim was processed last month.
I wanted to double check the onboarding checklist steps for my new hire starting Monday.
It's probably nothing but my manager keeps commenting on my appearance in a way that makes me uncomfortable.
I don't want to make a big deal of this, it's fine really, but my supervisor did touch me in a way I wasn't comfortable with.
